name: Kiyuri Namasu (Pickled Cucumbers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumbers and split them lengthwise.
2. Cut the cucumbers into thin slices and sprinkle lightly with salt.
3. Let stand for 15 minutes.
4. Squeeze out excess water from the cucumber slices.
5. Mix together the remaining ingredients: white vinegar, sugar, MSG, and chopped ginger.
6. Add the mixture to the cucumber slices and stir well.
7. Chill until serving.
8. This dish can be prepared in advance.
